Home / About Us / Subsidiaries

Our Subsidiary
Companies

Integrated capabilities across construction, manufacturing, emergency systems, and healthcare delivery.

View Our Work About Overview
Portfolio

Companies working together across every discipline

GMP's subsidiary network provides end-to-end coverage across the construction lifecycle. From general contracting and modular manufacturing to emergency response systems, each company brings specialized expertise that integrates seamlessly into a unified delivery model.

Subsidiaries

What we bring to the table

General Contractor

Agbayani Construction

Full-service general contracting across modular and civil construction programs. Agbayani handles everything from site preparation and foundation work to final assembly and turnover, bringing decades of field experience to every GMP project.

  • Commercial & Residential Modular
  • Civil Infrastructure
  • Design-Build Services
  • Site Preparation & Foundations
  • Government & DoD Projects
Manufacturing Partner

RI Group USA

International modular construction expertise connecting GMP to advanced manufacturing facilities and global supply chains. RI Group brings European precision engineering and quality standards to the American modular market.

  • Modular Manufacturing
  • International Supply Chain
  • Quality Assurance
  • HSS Steel Frame Systems
  • Factory Production Management
Early Warning & Preparedness

EDIS

Early warning systems and disaster preparedness technology for emergency management agencies.

  • Early Warning Systems
  • Disaster Preparedness
  • Emergency Management Technology
  • Risk Monitoring & Alerts
  • Agency-Ready Solutions
External Partner

Healthcare through global partnerships

HWB — Hospitals Without Borders

Humanitarian healthcare facilities, telemedicine platforms, and rapid-deployment clinical infrastructure serving communities worldwide. Through our partnership with HWB, GMP extends modular construction into global health, delivering fully equipped clinics and hospitals to underserved regions.

  • Healthcare Facilities
  • Telemedicine
  • Humanitarian Aid
  • Pediatric Clinics
  • Remote Diagnostics

Explore our capabilities

See how GMP's subsidiaries and partners deliver integrated construction, manufacturing, and emergency-preparedness solutions.
